_comment: Copy the relevant section into your Claude Desktop config file.
_instructions: 1. Open (or create) the config file at the path above
2. Paste the 'mcpServers' block below into it
3. Update the 'command' path to your actual Python interpreter
4. Update the 'args' path to the absolute path of solution.py
6. Look for the tools icon (hammer) in the chat input bar
